zh.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landells是William de Landells和Lady Jonet Hails的女兒，於1380年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾。她於1419年與Sir John de Lawedre在英國蘇格蘭洛迪安結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1425年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landells是William de Landells和Lady Jonet Hails的女儿，于1380年出生在英国苏格兰洛包爾。她于1419年与Sir John de Lawedre在英国苏格兰洛迪安结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1425年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Landells
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish, English: locative name from the district of Landelle(s) (Manche), recorded in the place-names Saint-Martin-de-Landelle and Saint-Brice-de-Landelles. The Norman surname appears with and without final -s.

variants.name: Landles
meanings: English, Scottish: variant of Landale with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Landell
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Landells, a habitational name from the district of Landelle(s) in Manche (France), recorded in the placenames Saint-Martin-de-Landelle and Saint-Brice-de-Landelles.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landells was born in 1380, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of William de Landells and Lady Jonet Hails. She married Sir John de Lawedre in 1419, in Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1425, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landells est née en 1380, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de William de Landells et Lady Jonet Hails. Elle a épousé Sir John de Lawedre en 1419, à Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1425, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landells wurde 1380 in Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von William de Landells und Lady Jonet Hails geboren. Sie hat 1419 in Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir John de Lawedre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1425 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landells è nata il nel 1380 nel Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di William de Landells e Lady Jonet Hails. Lei sposato Sir John de Lawedre nel 1419, nel Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1425, nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landellsは1380年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアでWilliam de LandellsとLady Jonet Hailsの娘として生まれた。1419年にイギリススコットランドロスアンでSir John de Lawedreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1425年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landells(은)는 1380년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 William de Landells(와)과 Lady Jonet Hails의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스이언에서 Sir John de Lawedre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landells nasceu em 1380, em Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de William de Landells e Lady Jonet Hails. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Lawedre em 1419, em Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1425, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landells родилась в 1380 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали William de Landells и Lady Jonet Hails. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Lawedre в 1419 г. в местности лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1425 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Landells nació en 1380, en Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de William de Landells y Lady Jonet Hails. Se casó con Sir John de Lawedre en 1419, en Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1425, en Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 45 años.
